<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Chunk; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ class FirstChunk extends DataChunk { public function isFirst(): bool { return true; } }
